gap_notes: No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
The README mentions a Streamlit monitoring dashboard ("Ralph Live"), but it is a locally-run tool (streamlit run dashboard/app.py), not a hosted public URL, so it is not tracked.

name: Ralph
notes: This netuid was previously tracked under the "Chunking" identity (VectorChat's text-chunking/RAG subnet, github.com/salahawk/chunking_subnet). On-chain SubnetIdentitiesV3 native_name, source_repo, and description now all point to "Ralph" (RalphLabsAI's decentralized, autonomous AI training-recipe research subnet) -- the same pivot pattern as SN3 Templar/Crusades, but more conclusively corroborated: the old chunking_subnet repo has been dead for 2+ years (last push 2024-05-26), subnet.chunking.com has an expired TLS certificate, and RalphLabsAI/ralph's own README explicitly self-identifies as "Live on Bittensor mainnet, netuid 40" and was pushed 13 days before this review. This is a full identity/ownership pivot, not cosmetic drift, so the old Chunking-era surfaces are retired rather than kept alongside the new ones. File renamed from chunking.json to ralph.json to match slugify(name). Ralph funds an open, continuously-improving training recipe (a canonical recipe repo miners patch, a public knowledge corpus of every evaluated change, and open-weights demonstration models) verified via attested execution (TDX + nvtrust hardware attestation). No public API, OpenAPI schema, or hosted dashboard found.

surfaces.name: Ralph protocol source repository
surfaces.notes: Official Ralph (SN40) protocol source repository -- validator, proof-test runner, attestation, scoring, and submission tooling. Self-identifies as "Live on Bittensor mainnet, netuid 40" in its own README.

surfaces.name: Ralph canonical recipe repository
surfaces.notes: Official Ralph (SN40) canonical training-recipe repository -- the model/recipe/config/data the network's miners patch and the merged history of accepted improvements. Distinct from the protocol repository already registered (this one is the patchable deliverable; the protocol repo is restricted infrastructure).

surfaces.name: Ralph whitepaper
surfaces.notes: Official Ralph whitepaper (v1.3, PDF), linked from the official protocol repository's README.

surfaces.name: Ralph Weights & Biases dashboard
surfaces.notes: Public Weights & Biases project (entity ralphlabs-hub, project ralph) for real-time Ralph training loss curves, linked from the official protocol repository's README.

surfaces.name: Ralph GitHub Discussions
surfaces.notes: Official Ralph org-level GitHub Discussions forum, linked from the protocol repository's README and used to publish phase results (e.g. the Phase 0.5 results discussion).

surfaces.name: Ralph TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/40 on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN40 on-chain subnet state, hyperparameters, economics, and dTAO market fields. Ralph has no verified first-party public API endpoint; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API.
